bhurghundii

 articles

my name is vikram chhapwale

i am a software engineer and artist

currently, i work at capitalone in london

people call me vik or burgundy



current projects


work

🍞 breadcrumb: digital scrapbook for manually tagging content like pictures and audio clips

⚡️ aws full stack template - use it if you wanna get running on aws fast

🏋️‍♀️ cli tool for giving you a random exercise to warm up against

☁️ github managed version of warmup using github actions in case you like a pretty ui to work with

🩺 eln-ai-ny: Machine Learning model to predict ENT cancer from HPV for a contest (we won!)

🍔 (archived) Lunchtime.IO - a social meet-up tool to allow the OpenCovid-19 Initiative to meet up online and have "lunch together"

♟️ my dissertation to create a self-learning agent which could play shogi. it's a miracle it works tbh

🕊️ (archived) moxie - free open source social network which runs using tor


talks

🎤 my talk at TechNottingham about my research to turn bacteria into cryptographic secure passwords

🎤 my presentation introducing eln-ai-ny, a AI model capable of id-ing ENT cancer


interviews / articles about me

📰 University of Nottingham writing about my research to turn bacteria into cryptographic secure passwords

📕 pre-pub of my research to turn bacteria into cryptographic secure passwords from my uni days
